utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified per the format requirement of '[type] insurance with costs' (and for total_budget, a complete monthly/annual cost breakdown). 1) health_coverage: includes provider, policy number, monthly cost (€100), coverage details, and effective date—meets 'physical and mental health insurance with costs' (mental health not explicitly stated but 'health insurance with costs' is present and detailed). 2) property_coverage: includes provider, policy number, monthly cost (€85), coverage details for home/contents and equipment, and effective date—meets 'home/contents insurance with costs'. 3) travel_coverage: includes provider, policy number, monthly cost (€130), coverage details, and effective date—meets 'travel insurance with costs'. 4) additional_services: includes provider, policy number, monthly cost (€75), coverage details, and effective date—meets 'any enhancement services with costs'. 5) total_budget: includes monthly total, annual total, previous monthly cost, monthly savings, and annual savings—meets 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown'. Therefore, all 5 items are included and sufficiently specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We match each item in the final coverage plan to the closest named option in the ground-truth ratings. For health_coverage, 'LifeFirst Standard Health Plan' corresponds to 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under primary_health_coverage.physical_health. For property_coverage, 'LifeFirst Property + Adventure Equipment Protection' maps to 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' under property_protection.home_content (closest LifeFirst property option). For travel_coverage, 'InsurePlus Standard Travel + Adventure Add-on' maps to 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance (InsurePlus travel). For additional_services, 'Marketing Professional Premium Liability' does not appear in any ground-truth list, so it cannot be mapped and is omitted.
